---
title: "CSF Spectronaut V1 Log2 Diagnostics"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    df-print: paged
execute:
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r setup}
library(data.table)
library(ggplot2)

variant_dir = "V1_log2"

method_specs = data.table(
  Method = c(
    "MSstats+",
    "MSstats",
    "limpa",
    "MaxLFQ + limma",
    "msqrob2",
    "DEqMS",
    "prolfqua"
  ),
  Dir = c(
    "MSstats+",
    "MSstats",
    "limpa",
    "limma",
    "msqrob2",
    "DEqMS",
    "prolfqua"
  ),
  File = c(
    "MSstats+_model.csv",
    "MSstats_model.csv",
    "limpa_model.csv",
    "limma_model.csv",
    "msqrob2_model.csv",
    "deqms_model.csv",
    "prolfqua_model.csv"
  ),
  FCCol = c("log2FC", "log2FC", "logFC", "logFC", "logFC", "logFC", "logFC")
)

method_levels = method_specs$Method

read_model = function(method, dir, file, fc_col) {
  dt = fread(file.path(variant_dir, dir, file))
  data.table(
    Method = method,
    Protein = dt$Protein,
    Label = dt$Label,
    pvalue = dt$pvalue,
    adj.pvalue = dt$adj.pvalue,
    logFC = dt[[fc_col]]
  )
}

models = rbindlist(
  Map(
    read_model,
    method_specs$Method,
    method_specs$Dir,
    method_specs$File,
    method_specs$FCCol
  )
)

models[, Method := factor(Method, levels = method_levels)]
models[, Label := factor(Label, levels = c("Positive", "Negative"))]

metric_table = function(threshold_col) {
  threshold = models[[threshold_col]]
  significant = threshold < 0.05 & is.finite(models$logFC)
  tmp = copy(models)
  tmp[, significant := significant]

  out = tmp[, {
    finite_fc = is.finite(logFC)
    n_discoveries = sum(significant, na.rm = TRUE)
    false_discoveries = sum(significant & Label == "Negative", na.rm = TRUE)

    .(
      CSF_TPR = sum(significant & Label == "Positive", na.rm = TRUE) /
        sum(finite_fc & Label == "Positive", na.rm = TRUE),
      CSF_PPV = if (n_discoveries > 0) {
        1 - false_discoveries / n_discoveries
      } else {
        NA_real_
      },
      n_estimated_logFC = sum(finite_fc, na.rm = TRUE)
    )
  }, by = Method]

  out[, c("CSF_TPR", "CSF_PPV") := lapply(.SD, round, 3),
      .SDcols = c("CSF_TPR", "CSF_PPV")]
  out[]
}

discovery_table = function(threshold_col) {
  threshold = models[[threshold_col]]
  significant = threshold < 0.05 & is.finite(models$logFC)
  tmp = copy(models)
  tmp[, significant := significant]

  tmp[, .(
    positive_discoveries = sum(significant & Label == "Positive", na.rm = TRUE),
    negative_discoveries = sum(significant & Label == "Negative", na.rm = TRUE),
    total_discoveries = sum(significant, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_positive = sum(Label == "Positive" & is.finite(logFC), na.rm = TRUE),
    n_negative = sum(Label == "Negative" & is.finite(logFC), na.rm = TRUE)
  ), by = Method][]
}

pvalue_metrics = metric_table("pvalue")
fdr_metrics = metric_table("adj.pvalue")
pvalue_discoveries = discovery_table("pvalue")
fdr_discoveries = discovery_table("adj.pvalue")
```

## P-Value Histograms

```{r pvalue-histogram, fig.width=11, fig.height=8}
ggplot(models[is.finite(pvalue)], aes(x = pvalue, fill = Label)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 0.025, boundary = 0, color = "white") +
  facet_wrap(~ Method, ncol = 2, scales = "free_y") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(Positive = "#2c7fb8", Negative = "#f03b20")) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, 1)) +
  labs(x = "p-value", y = "Protein count", fill = "Label") +
  theme_bw(base_size = 11) +
  theme(panel.grid.minor = element_blank())
```

## FDR Histograms

```{r fdr-histogram, fig.width=11, fig.height=8}
ggplot(models[is.finite(adj.pvalue)], aes(x = adj.pvalue, fill = Label)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 0.025, boundary = 0, color = "white") +
  facet_wrap(~ Method, ncol = 2, scales = "free_y") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(Positive = "#2c7fb8", Negative = "#f03b20")) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, 1)) +
  labs(x = "BH adjusted p-value", y = "Protein count", fill = "Label") +
  theme_bw(base_size = 11) +
  theme(panel.grid.minor = element_blank())
```

## Raw P-Value Threshold Table

Threshold: `pvalue < 0.05`.

```{r pvalue-metrics}
pvalue_metrics
```

```{r pvalue-discoveries}
pvalue_discoveries
```

## FDR Threshold Table

Threshold: `adj.pvalue < 0.05`.

```{r fdr-metrics}
fdr_metrics
```

```{r fdr-discoveries}
fdr_discoveries
```
